summary: Tested Frameflow login-only auth system with super admin accounts, admin panel client management, and public pages (Privacy Policy, Data Deletion). Fixed billing endpoint timezone bug. All critical features working.

minor.issue: Dashboard fails for super_admin users who don't have brand profiles - shows 'Failed to load dashboard data' error

integration_issues.issue: When super_admin logs in, they are redirected to /dashboard which fails because admins don't have brand profiles. Should redirect to /admin instead.

action_items: Consider redirecting super_admin users to /admin instead of /dashboard after login
Or create a dashboard view that works for super_admin users
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Billing endpoint had timezone-aware vs naive datetime comparison bug causing 500 error
Login-only auth correctly implemented - no signup option, WhatsApp demo request button present
Super admin accounts working correctly with super_admin role
Admin panel client management fully functional
Public pages (privacy-policy, data-deletion) accessible without auth
WhatsApp floating button present on dashboard pages with correct number +919330408074

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All pages load correctly, minor UX issue with super_admin dashboard

seed_data_creation: Test clients created: TEST_Coffee Shop, TEST_New Cafe, TEST_Login Cafe
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin and auth features working. Both super admin accounts can login and access /admin panel. Client creation via admin works. Public pages accessible. Dashboard fails for super_admin users (minor UX issue). Meta OAuth requires platform credentials (MOCKED).

features_verified.login_only_auth: PASS - No signup form, only login with email/password
features_verified.whatsapp_demo_button: PASS - Present on auth page with correct number
features_verified.super_admin_1_login: PASS - adreej@frameflow.me can login with super_admin role
features_verified.super_admin_2_login: PASS - deepesh@frameflow.me can login with super_admin role
features_verified.admin_panel_at_/admin: PASS - Shows client management with stats
features_verified.admin_create_client: PASS - Can create new clients with billing record
features_verified.whatsapp_floating_button: PASS - Present on dashboard with correct number +919330408074
features_verified.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All nav items present for logged-in users
features_verified.admin_panel_link: PASS - Visible only to super_admin users

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Billing endpoint returning 500 Internal Server Error
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added timezone handling for due_date in admin_get_billing_overview endpoint

mocked_apis.Meta_OAuth: Backend ready but requires META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET env vars
